4.Traphase
[New Content]
● Mechanism
    ○ Arithmetica Overload: After playing, if the remaining Arithmetica exceeds the required amount for Arithmetica Overload, additionally consume Arithmetica to trigger subsequent effects.
    ○ Falter: Active DMG taken increased by 25%. Removed when taking damage or at the start of the turn.
● Awakener
    ○ Kathigu-Ra
        ■ World-Ending Inferno (Exalt): Deal 12 DMG to all enemies and inflict Falter.
        ■ Apocalypse (Arithmetica Cost 3): Deal 8 damage to all enemies, and for enemies with Falter, change to deal 12 damage, Prepare. Arithmetica Overload 3: Deal double damage.
        ■ Reaper's Bullet (Arithmetica Cost 1): Deal 6 DMG to backline enemies and apply Falter, Prepare. For each of your "Skill" cards played this turn, increase the damage by 2. Arithmetica Overload 1: Return to your hand after playing.
        ■ Combustion (Arithmetica Cost 2): Gain 20 Aliemus, Temporary Amplification +1.
● Wheel of Destiny
    ○ Amber-Tinted Death (Arithmetica Cost 2): After "Exalt", deals 8 damage to the front-row and back-row enemies and applies "Falter".
    ○ Impending Sun (Arithmetica Cost 3): "Strike" DMG increased by 50%, prioritizes attacking back row enemies.

the balance of LoL rest on the "perpetual imbalance" school of thought
Basically you "balance" the game by keeping it in an imbalance state where overpowered things change over time instead of making them as strong as one another 
With the purpose of keeping the game "fresh" and "unsolved" this way
To conclude, saying anything is less balanced than LoL isn't a really great compliment 😔
